etymology.description: č‰ą(č‰ą) (cÇŽo, "grass") + phonetic: äşĄ(äşĄ) (hĂ i, "twelfth earthly branch") = plant part related to grass -> roots
etymology.interpretation: čŤ„(čŤ„) (hĂ i, "roots") combines the semantic component č‰ą(č‰ą) (cÇŽo, "grass") to indicate a connection to plants, with the phonetic component äşĄ(äşĄ) (hĂ i) to evoke the sound, resulting in the meaning of roots.
